context.goal: Place a text comment annotation on the PDF page and fill it with a short comment.
context.cues: TIAEditor is open with page 1 displayed. The Insert comment / text annotation tool is active, and the page shows the title text 'aketin Basics' with highlighted letters. A blank area above the title is available for placing a comment icon.

state_anchor.locator: bottom status text: 'Insert Text Annotation mode: click on pdf to insert an annotation'

anchors.locator: blank page area above and left of the 'aketin Basics' title where the yellow comment icon will appear
Add annotation dialog, large multiline Comment field

procedure.expect: The 'Add annotation' dialog opens over the page with the Comment text area focused or ready for input.
The Comment field contains the typed text 'hi'.
The dialog closes and a yellow speech-bubble comment annotation icon appears at the chosen location on the page.
